___doc: Keys excluded from governance UI coverage audit. Each key maps to a reason why it's not consumed in the storefront UI.

enable_google_auth.reason: Key mismatch: codebase uses 'enable_google_oauth' — contract key should be updated to match

enable_maintenance_mode.reason: System flag — consumed in middleware, not UI components

enable_owner_panel.reason: System flag — consumed in middleware/layout, not UI components

enable_admin_api.reason: System flag — backend-only, no UI representation

owner_advanced_modules_enabled.reason: Meta flag — computed from module subscriptions, not directly consumed

owner_lite_enabled.reason: Meta flag — plan-level, consumed implicitly via module resolution

require_auth_to_order.reason: Checkout flow flag — consumed in checkout middleware, not panel UI

enable_cookie_consent.reason: Legal compliance flag — consumed in CookieBanner component, may not match exact key pattern

max_admin_users.reason: Backend-enforced — no panel UI for adding admin users yet

max_requests_day.reason: Infrastructure limit — enforced by rate limiter middleware, no UI

max_file_upload_mb.reason: Enforced server-side in upload actions, no visible UI counter

storage_limit_mb.reason: Enforced via StorageLimitBanner — may not match exact key grep

max_customers.reason: Read-only metric — customers self-register, no 'add' CTA to gate

max_orders_month.reason: Read-only metric — orders come from checkout, no 'add' CTA to gate
